positive: A central, highly stylized graphic illustration of bioluminescent cosmic flora and ethereal mountain silhouettes. The composition must feature clean, strong outlines, perfect symmetry, and ample negative space, designed as a seamless, medallion print for apparel. The style should mimic a modern, highly detailed blackwork tattoo flash or etched woodcut print, utilizing stark black lines and contrasting vibrant jewel tones (electric blue, deep violet, cyan, emerald green). Focus on clean silhouettes, high contrast, and a magical, yet structured, celestial motif. Studio lighting, 8k detail.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, noisy, jpeg artifacts, poorly drawn, out of focus, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, clutter
